name: libmirisdr4
title: libmirisdr4
summary: Software defined radio support for Mirics hardware (library)
description:
Software defined radio support for Mirics hardware (library)
Software for the Mirics MSi2500 + MSi001 SDR platform
.
The hardware part of MiriSDR brings information from an antenna connector
to a USB plug.
.
This package is the software that provides control of the USB hardware
and an API to pass data to software defined radio applications on the host.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmirisdr4 because Software defined radio support for Mirics hardware (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmirisdr4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmirisdr4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmirisdr4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
